title: The Agent uploads a write-up to the Records Vault with kind reconciliation_support, retention AICPA_SQMS_7Y, classification internal, related to reconciliation BL-333FF9956BC6, and uploaded by ben.arinzo@brookfieldcpas.com.

annotations.evidence: Look for a records-vault upload tool call in the trajectory with kind=reconciliation_support, retention_policy_code=AICPA_SQMS_7Y, classification=internal, related_resource_type=reconciliation, related_resource_id=BL-333FF9956BC6, and uploaded_by=ben.arinzo@brookfieldcpas.com. Confirm the tool returned a success response.
annotations.justification: The prompt asks Ben to 'drop a write-up of what you saw on the prior-period record and the documents into the vault under the close-cycle file so it is on hand for George.' Per OE 20, this is the required compliance-grade vault upload tied to the open Cash-Payroll reconciliation, with the persona as uploader.

title: The Agent's Records Vault write-up identifies exc_d8fc13aa2cc742 in brookfield_FP-2025-12 (type unrecorded_invoice, financial impact $617.63, closed by a corrective journal entry on reconciliation BL-782A2EC69343) as the actual recent prior-period precedent on account 102000 (or similar).

All five facts come from the same exception record so they pass or fail together.
